mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_mbr_acct ma WHERE 1 = 1
AND ma.del_at IS NULL
AND ( ma.lgn_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR ma.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') )
AND ma.role = #{req.role}

SELECT ma.mbr_acct_idx AS idx, ma.mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, ma.lgn_id, ma.pwd, ma.email, ma.role, mp.nick_nm, mp.intro, ma.created_by, ma.updated_by, ma.created_at, ma.updated_at, ma.del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct ma LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = ma.mbr_acct_idx WHERE ma.mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET del_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT bp.brd_pst_idx AS idx, bp.brd_pst_uuid AS uuid, bp.brd_ctgr_idx, bc.brd_ctgr_uuid, bp.mbr_acct_idx, ma.lgn_id, bc.nm AS ctgr_nm, bp.ttl, bp.cntnt, bp.view_cnt, mp.nick_nm AS athr_nick_nm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fav f WHERE f.trgt_type = 'BOARD_POST' AND f.trgt_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx ) AS fav_cnt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_cmt c WHERE c.brd_pst_idx = bp.brd_pst_idx AND c.del_at IS NULL ) AS cmt_cnt, bp.created_by, bp.updated_by, bp.created_at, bp.updated_at, bp.del_at FROM tb_brd_pst bp INNER JOIN tb_brd_ctgr bc ON bc.brd_ctgr_idx = bp.brd_ctgr_idx INNER JOIN tb_mbr_acct ma ON ma.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx LEFT JOIN tb_mbr_prfl mp ON mp.mbr_acct_idx = bp.mbr_acct_idx WHERE 1 = 1
AND bp.del_at IS NULL
AND ( bp.ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR bp.cntnt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') )
ORDER BY ${req.orderByClause} LIMIT #{req.size} OFFSET #{req.offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_pst bp WHERE 1 = 1
AND bp.del_at IS NULL
AND ( bp.ttl LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') OR bp.cntnt LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.kwd}, '%') )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_brd_pst SET del_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE brd_pst_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_mbr_acct) AS total_mbr_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE del_at IS NULL) AS actv_mbr_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_pst) AS total_brd_pst_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_brd_cmt) AS total_brd_cmt_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_file) AS total_file_cnt
